results.title: A Travel Blogger’s Review of the Solgaard Carry-On Closet | wayward
results.content:
Beware as they have no customer support or warranty! Very difficult to get ahold of or any information for a very expensive piece of luggage. They won’t take responsibility of any damage considered “normal” by Delta Airlines and neither will Delta. I’m just saying beware of what this company and their warranty.

I know that must be frustrating – have you tried calling, using the chat, or emailing? Perhaps it might be worth trying a different avenue. [...] that I just wanted them to be aware of the flaw and they no longer communicated with me. I think they would have tried to get out of the warranty no matter what I provided to them. I am very disappointed in the quality of the bag overall, for the price. I would not recommend buying this bag unless you are a very light packer and can ensure you will never have to check it. [...] I’ve had mine for a couple of years now and I’ve taken several trips with it. I think your complaints are valid. My biggest issue with this suitcase is figuring out how to pack it. Overpacking it will be a nightmare for anybody traveling so you have to really be conscious about what you put in the suitcase. I have figured out a workaround by shoving as much into the corners or sides of the shelving system as I can. Once you figure out how to minimalize your packing, the suitcase is wonderful and I love it. My only other complaint is, it’s heavier than I thought it would be.

results.title: JenniBag review?? : r/HerOneBag
results.content:
Reply  Share 

 but since it was to Greece they weighed it. Anyways -bag looked like someone had run over it with a tractor, the beige material shows every mark that even comes near the bag. My family of 6’s carryon luggage all looked fine but mine looked pathetic lol. My carryon was the joke of the trip with my family. The handle stiching ripped from the sides and the handles themselves got ripped up. I reached out to customer service asking for a refund but I am getting the runaround. I said at least send me a new bag because this one is total sht after 10 days of average travel. This bag is a scam. The concept is good but needs improvements and durability. I would pay for a better version of this, new material, better zippers, better rolling capabilities, better stitching. [...] heatherfeatherm2

Never purchase this bag!! I can't even comment on the quality of it because I haven't opened it. It arrived after I left for my trip and when I made numerous attempts to contact them to return it they ghosted me. I have never in my life been ghosted by a company. Horrible!!

.

The material is indeed cheap, it is very faux leather, and while mine hasn’t torn yet, I do feel like it eventually will.

I haven’t noticed any zipper issues (another commenter had said they thought zippers were cheap), but the zippers seem fine and strong.

For the cost, I’d look into other brands that seem more rugged like half day. I ended up half filling one of the bags to use as a personal item. They do fit easily into things, and they are cute. But I won’t reach for this bag on international trips, it’s more of a drive to where you’re going bag.

Back to top [...] American Airlines Cargo

The minimum size of the aircraft cargo hold doors on aircraft is 25 in high x 40 in wide / 63 cm high x 101 cm wide, the ERJ 170 is a bit smaller at 25 in x 38 in. If your musical instrument is larger, please contact Reservations for the exact size of cargo hold doors on the aircraft in your journey.

Please note that due to their fragile nature, we will only be liable for damages to musical instruments if:

 Your instrument is in a hard-sided case
 The outside of the case is visibly damaged

 Reservations and ticket changes
 Delayed or damaged bags

### Travel tips [...] ## Enable JavaScript

Please enable JavaScript to fully experience this site. How to enable JavaScript

1. Home
2. At the airport
3. Bags
4. Special items and sports equipment

# Special items and sports equipment

## Special items

Rules, exceptions and packing instructions apply to special items. The maximum weight for most items is 100 lbs / 45 kg (some exceptions apply). The maximum size is 115 in / 292 cm (length + width + height). For travel to / from Mexico boxes cannot exceed 80 in / 203 cm in total dimensions (length + width + height).

For travel from Madrid, Spain (MAD) the maximum length of any side of a checked item cannot exceed 43 in / 110 cm. Items with maximum total outside dimensions up to 115 in / 292 cm (length + width + height) are accepted.

results.title: Bag Policy | Ball Arena
results.content:
Bag Check with Binbox Lockers

+ Located near the Infinity Sculpture and the Spires in the Grand Atrium (main entrance) Plaza. Pricing starts at $12 per checked bag which is non-refundable. Debit/credit and mobile payment, such as Apple or Google Pay, are acceptable forms of payment. No cash will be accepted. Ball Arena has a “No Re-Entry” policy for all events and bags stored in the lockers will not be accessible during the event. Bag check opens 30 minutes prior to general doors and closes 1-hour post-event. Bags remaining after that time will be brought to Lost & Found.
+ Ball Arena, KSE, and its subsidiaries are not responsible for lost, stolen, broken or damaged items checked in to the Binbox lockers.

Just because a bag is listed as carry-on compliant here doesn't mean that the airline will interpret it that way.

Sign up to get our 5 Minimalist Travel Hacks Guide. Plus, a weekly digest of our newest content in the newsletter. [...] Able Carry Daily Plus Other Passport
Able Carry Daily Plus Other Passport

Lastly, turn the bag around to the back panel, and you’ll find a quick access zip pocket at the top that’s great for holding your phone and wallet. It’s deep enough to carry what you need, yet not so large that your hand gets stuck trying to pull things out. We like that it’s secure against our backs to prevent theft—at least while wearing the backpack—and this one also has a top fabric flap concealing it.

Now to the main event, the main compartment! It opens in a horseshoe shape around the top of the bag with an AquaGuard zipper. We like the added protection since this is the only zipper on the bag not protected by a fabric welt.
